title: TooneQuest
description:
TooneQuest is a Creature Collection game. You must explore the islands and discover the whereabouts of the Toones, but once you do, you must capture them by succeeding in a test of skill and timing.

Go explore, take those leaps of faith, but know you will quickly return safely from any misadventure.

You will start your adventure on Omphalos, the island of eternal day. This magical place is not just where you start, but also the center of your adventure. Return when you have earned an Ability upgrade and use that new ability to navigate to another island's Portal gate.

This is also where you capture your companion Toone, Serenity. They will accompany you on your journey and light up your life when things get too dark.

While searching for the Toones, you will pass many vistas and beautiful landmarks. However every island has its own inimical flavour and feel. Trees can hide the more shy Toones, or perhaps they are hiding behind giant boulders in unforeseen canyons? Some Toones are not shy at all and you can see them proudly bouncing up and down in the distance, only then you have to figure out how to get to them.

When you start, you can run, so run swiftly to capture your first Toones. Once you have caught enough you will earn an Ability. To get the ability, simply go back to Omphalos and collect it.

Abilities such as Jump, Crawl, Double jump and Glide can be earned by the hardened adventurer.

When exploring the islands you will come across some Food. In fact there is lots of food on each island and to obtain Completion, you must collect not only all the Toones, but also all the Food.

We sincerely hope you enjoy the journey in this game, 

~ Enders Workshop
description_short: An exploring and capture game. Find and capture all the unique creatures hiding on the 5 islands. Discover Abilities such as Jump, Crawl, Glide and Double-jump to help you explore.
